violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Jar of alfredo sauce not dated for open date. -Roast beef dated 6/25 (freeze date) was not dated for thaw date.

General equipment and utensils - Materials and design. — --Material of nonfood contact surface was not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent and cleanable. -Cloth used as liner below single use bowls at microwave top. -Paper towels being used at utensil rests at cook line. -Cardboard used below inverted ice bucket next to ice machine.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Front pane glass of oven door is missing.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Grease/debris build up at small black fan. -Freezers throughout facility have build up of frost at interior surfaces (manager plans to defrost all units before rally). -Some dust/debris at surfaces in walk in cooler. -Heavy debris at interior bottom of bin used to store ice scoop (next to ice machine).

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Odor around hand wash station. Possible caused: soiled cloths in tote, mop stored in bucket spinner, drain odor.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insects, rodents, or other pests were not controlled in a manner specified in the food service code to minimize their presence within the facility. -Presence of flies. -Mouse feces in cabinets below 3 comparment sink.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employee came back to kitchen area and did not wash hands before putting on gloves to begin food prep.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Roast beef had freeze date of 10/29 but was not re-rated for thaw date.

Contaminated food disposition. — --Potentially hazardous food held for greater than four hours between 41F and 140F was not discarded when conditions require. -Hamburgers are cooked off for lunch service and then reheated per order but did not have a time stamp for disposal.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Frost build up at interior -Residue/limescale in bottom of bin used to stored ice scoops. *Staff washed at 3 comp sink immediately.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Case of single use food containers stored on floor in dry storage room.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Heavy residue at floor of walk in cooler. -Debris/slime build up at wall below ice machine plumbing lines. *Due for deep clean in ice machine/food storage room.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Holes in wall behind ice machine.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Proper storage, no-reuse (1 pt deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
